source_pr.title: test: fix ddl test duplicated test cases due to wrong embedding struct
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?
fix ddl test duplicated cases  due to wrong embedding struct

### What is changed and how it works?
The ddl test suite `serialTestStateChangeSuite` embedding another test suite `testStateChangeSuite`, so all the test cases under `testStateChangeSuite` will be implicitly auto-generated for `serialTestStateChangeSuite` thus make ddl test run slow and unnecessary .

result:
before changes: 
```
> go test -v -vet=off -p 10 -race github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl
ok  	github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl	103.783s
```

after change:
```
> go test -v -vet=off -p 10 -race github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl
ok  	github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl	87.718s
```

### Check List
Tests

- unit tests

Code changes

Side effects

Related changes

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: test: fix ddl test duplicated test cases due to wrong embedding struct.
fix_pattern: test: fix ddl test duplicated test cases due to wrong embedding struct
